label: AI Insight UI — Provenance
info:
Exposes provenance routes for the UI:
  GET /api/v1/provenance/transfers — lists DSP data-transfer events from global.transfers (DSP transfer-process flow writes here)
  GET /api/v1/provenance/insights  — lists AI Insight outputs persisted by the AI Insight backend tabs (read from global.ai_insight_outputs)

name: build transfers response
build insights response
